news.headline: German 30 Yr 2.5% Auction
Reason for Litecoin's surge: Canary Capital's Litecoin ETF filing and Bitcoin hitting a multimonth high led to LTC price increase.
news.summary: The recent rise in Litecoin's price follows the news that Canary Capital submitted a request for a Litecoin ETF. This development coincides with Bitcoin hitting a new high for the first time in several months.

news.headline: UPM lowers outlook for 2024 due to lower deliveries & decreased pulp prices. Q3 2024 shows 32% increase in EBIT to EUR 291M
news.summary: In Helsinki on October 16, 2024, UPM has revised its 2024 forecast downwards and announced its preliminary results for Q3 2024. The company's earnings showed improvement in the latter part of the year, albeit not as much as initially projected. The comparable EBIT for Q3 2024 surged by 32% to EUR 291 million compared to previous figures.

news.headline: The high cost of Trump's tariffs revealed in new report with staggering numbers.
German 30 Yr Bund Yield Actual 2.49% (Forecast -, Previous 2.44%)
German 30 Yr Bund Bid-to-cover Actual 3.63 (Forecast -, Previous 2.7)
AIB CEO predicts full privatization by 2025 in a recent interview.
Airtel Business and Vonage team up to launch advanced business communications app in India, offering multi-channel capabilities and real-time monitoring.
news.summary: A new communications platform has been launched in India, offering advanced features such as multi-channel capabilities, real-time monitoring, and data loss prevention. This tool aims to assist enterprises in improving their stakeholder communications. Developed by Airtel Business, the B2B division of Bharti Airtel, the platform was introduced on October 16, 2024, in Gurugram. The application provides cutting-edge functionalities to aid businesses in India, enhancing their communication strategies.

news.headline: EICMA 2024 celebrates 110 years with all major manufacturers returning. 81st edition at Fiera Milano-Rho from Nov. 5-10.
news.summary: The 81st edition of the International Two-Wheeler Exhibition is set to take place from November 5 to 10 at Fiera Milano-Rho in Milan. The event marks a significant milestone with the participation of all major manufacturers and promises a diverse range of entertainment. Scheduled to showcase the latest innovations and developments in the industry, this edition is expected to draw a large audience. The exhibition will feature a variety of displays and activities, making it a must-attend event for motorcycle enthusiasts and industry professionals. The event is set to attract a crowd of enthusiasts and experts, with a wealth of exciting experiences awaiting attendees.

news.headline: Tokenization sector, per report, may grow 50 times by 2030 with the market worth exceeding $10 trillion, reshaping investing.
news.summary: By 2030, the financial markets are projected to play a crucial role in propelling a substantial portion of the sector's growth that could exceed $10 trillion. This trend has the potential to revolutionize investment practices and ownership of assets in the coming decade.

news.headline: Art sparks critical discussions globally, as highlighted by Wu Qinli in a recent dialogue with Stanford University professor.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on October 16, 2024, Wu Qinli stated during a discussion with Stanford University professor Jody that art can spark meaningful conversations, a sentiment echoed globally. This acknowledgment emphasizes the impact of art in fostering dialogue and encouraging critical thinking. The exchange highlighted the significance of this concept in countries such as China and the US, underscoring the widespread recognition of art's role in promoting discussion and engagement.

news.headline: Arbitrum Orbit enhances blockchain tech with custom chains and interoperability in Ethereum, driving innovation.
news.summary: Arbitrum Orbit is transforming the blockchain landscape by introducing customizable chains, heightened decentralization, and interoperability, which is driving innovation within the Ethereum ecosystem. This technology is significantly impacting the blockchain sector by allowing for efficient customization of chains and enhancing decentralization levels. Moreover, the increased interoperability is facilitating seamless interaction within the Ethereum network, empowering developers and users alike to explore new possibilities and applications. This development is vital for the growth and advancement of blockchain technology, marking a pivotal moment in its evolution.

news.headline: Jiangxi province strengthens ties with Greater Bay Area through economic and trade conference in Shenzhen on Sept 2, 2024.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Shenzhen, China, the Jiangxi International Communication Center (JXICC) released a report detailing the economic and trade cooperation conference held between Jiangxi province and the Greater Bay Area on September 2, 2024. The conference aimed to accelerate collaboration between the two regions, focusing on promoting business opportunities and enhancing economic ties. The event brought together key stakeholders from both areas to discuss strategies for boosting trade and investment. Key topics included infrastructure development, investment opportunities, and fostering closer economic integration. This conference signifies a significant step towards enhancing economic cooperation and growth, with promising outcomes for both Jiangxi province and the Greater Bay Area.

news.headline: Squirrel Ai launches S20 tablet at CES 2024 with TCL's NXTPAPER display, pioneering adaptive learning tech.
news.summary: In Shanghai on October 16, 2024, it was announced that TCL's NXTPAPER display is now featured in the new flagship smart learning tablet, the Squirrel Ai S20. This tablet was unveiled at CES 2024. The partnership between TCL and Squirrel Ai Learning is a result of the achievements of the Squirrel Ai V12.

news.headline: Gogoro and Cycle & Carriage launch battery swapping in Singapore with three Smartscooters.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Gogoro Inc., a leading technology company in battery-swapping systems with a focus on sustainable urban mobility, revealed plans with its Singapore distribution partner Cycle & Carriage to introduce a new initiative. The companies have joined forces to bring forth this project and are set to roll it out in the near future. Gogoro Inc. (Nasdaq: GGR) is renowned for its innovative approach to sustainable transportation solutions, while Cycle & Carriage will act as the exclusive distributor in Singapore for this partnership. Stay tuned for further updates on this exciting development.

news.headline: Trina Storage helps Eku Energy complete their first 40MWh battery storage project in the UK, achieving successful grid connection.
news.summary: Trina Storage, a prominent global energy storage solutions provider, revealed on October 16, 2024, the accomplishment of the grid connection and activation of the Maldon 40MWh Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) in partnership with renowned energy storage specialist Eku. This latest system marks a significant advancement in the field of energy storage, showcasing Trina Storage's expertise in developing cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Exyte acquires Kinetics, a leader in installation services, equipment, and technical facility management for high-tech industries.
news.summary: The acquisition of a prominent industry leader in installation services, equipment, and technical facility management has been finalized after receiving approval from all necessary regulatory entities. The company specializes in serving high-tech sectors including semiconductor, biopharma, and batteries. This strategic move signifies a significant development in the industry and aims to enhance the company's presence and offerings in key sectors.

news.headline: Ammonia Market projected to reach $91.95 billion by 2029, covering various industries globally.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a report on the ammonia market was released on October 16, 2024. The study covers different types of ammonia such as anhydrous and aqueous, sales channels including direct and indirect, and key end-use industries like agriculture, textile, refrigeration, mining, and pharmaceutical. The global forecast for the ammonia market is projected to span until 2029. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into industry trends and growth opportunities, catering to various sectors with estimated significant market figures.

news.headline: Binance alters leverage & margins for REEF/USDT contracts, effective Oct 16, 2024. Funding rate frequency also updated.
news.summary: Changes have been announced by Binance Futures for the USDⓈ-M REEFUSDT perpetual contracts, set to be effective on October 16, 2024. These adjustments include modifications to leverage, margin tiers, and funding rate frequency.

news.headline: Zyda-2 dataset, created by Zyphra and NVIDIA, with 5T tokens, transforms AI training with NeMo Curator. (Read More)
news.summary: Zyphra and NVIDIA have collaborated to create the innovative Zyda-2 dataset, which consists of a remarkable 5 trillion tokens. This dataset is significantly boosting Large Language Model (LLM) training, leading to improved artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities and effectiveness. The partnership between Zyphra and NVIDIA is redefining the benchmarks for AI advancement.

news.headline: Italy's Economy Minister Giorgetti confirms tax wedge cut to be permanent in future.
ETH Zurich, INSAIT, and LatticeFlow AI collaborate to launch EU AI Act Compliance Evaluation Framework for Generative AI at compl-ai.org, aiding Large Language Models (LLMs).
news.summary: ETH Zurich, INSAIT, and LatticeFlow AI have partnered to introduce the initial evaluation framework for Generative AI models under the EU AI Act. The release can be accessed at https://compl-ai.org, offering a detailed technical analysis of the EU AI Act, aligning regulatory standards with technical criteria. The framework, designed for assessing Large Language Models (LLMs), is open-source and complimentary. This unveiling marks a milestone in compliance-centric evaluations within the AI sector.

news.headline: Disney Pixel RPG reached 1 million downloads globally within 7 days of its launch. GungHo offers bonuses to players.
news.summary: In Tokyo, game developer GungHo is commemorating reaching a milestone of 1 million downloads for their Disney Pixel RPG game. To show appreciation to users, they are offering a range of bonuses and rewards.

news.headline: Over 25 million Americans experience fear of flying. Tools and tips can help make plane rides less scary.
news.summary: The fear of flying impacts over 25 million individuals in the United States alone. For those experiencing this anxiety, utilizing specific tools and expert advice can potentially alleviate stress and make future air travels more manageable.

news.headline: In Tulsa, Okla., remote workers paid to relocate helped reverse brain drain - a win-win situation for everyone involved.
news.summary: A study revealed that a financial incentive provided to remote workers to relocate to Tulsa, Oklahoma resulted in mutual benefits for all parties involved.

news.headline: Iran's Atomic Energy Organisation Spokesperson: An attack on Iranian nuclear sites is highly unlikely, any damage would quickly be compensated - NourNews.
Melcor REIT's "go-shop" period ends; Melcor to buy 45% interest in REIT LP for $4.95/unit cash ($64.35M total). Proceeds used to repurchase Trust Units.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, on October 16, 2024, Melcor Real Estate Investment Trust (Melcor REIT) (TSX:MR.UN) shared that the "go-shop" period defined in the arrangement agreement from September 12, 2024, has ended. This agreement involves Melcor Developments Ltd. planning to acquire its unowned equity interest, around 45%, in Melcor REIT Limited Partnership (REIT LP) for $4.95 per unit in cash. The unowned equity interest includes all of REIT LP's 13.0 million outstanding Class A LP Units. Following the arrangement, the REIT intends to use the funds from the REIT LP Sale to buy back and eliminate all existing participating trust units (Trust Units).

news.headline: Nuclera secures $75M USD financing, led by Elevage Medical Technologies with investment from British Patient Capital.
news.summary: Nuclera, a biotechnology company based in Cambridge, England and Boston, has successfully closed a funding round of $75 million (approximately £57 million). Elevage Medical Technologies, supported by Patient Square Capital, led the fundraising effort, with additional participation from British Patient Capital and Cambridge Innovation Capital. Nuclera specializes in enhancing protein expression and purification processes with its innovative benchtop protein system.

news.headline: California's effective AI regulation sees positive outcomes, showcasing success in tech oversight.
US reveals plan with 11 nations to monitor North Korea's nuclear threat.
Israeli Military: Navy struck Hezbollah infrastructure in Southern Lebanon
UK house prices rise by 2.8% in 12 months to August vs 1.8% in July - ONS

Global Duty Free and Travel Retail Market valued at USD 38.9 billion in 2023, expected to reach USD 77.8 billion by 2033 with a CAGR of 8.30%. Resilience shown post-COVID-19 with strategic alliances and retail growth measures.
news.summary: The global Duty Free and Travel Retail Market size was valued at USD 38.9 Billion in 2023, expected to rise to USD 41.4 Billion in 2024, and projected to reach around USD 77.8 Billion by 2033, with a CAGR of about 8.30% during 2024-2033. Growth is driven by rising global air passenger traffic, innovative retail strategies like digital technologies, demand for luxury goods, and strategic partnerships. The COVID-19 pandemic impacted consumer behavior, leading to a focus on health and safety, operational challenges, resilience shown by retailers through digital transformation, shifts in product preferences, and a outlook for market recovery with investments in digital innovation and customer-centric strategies.

news.headline: Treasury bills auctioned on 16/10/24 with successful bids at record low yield of 0.5%. Total amount raised $1.2 billion.
An Israeli strike hits municipal building in South Lebanon town of Nabatieh, kills 5 - Lebanon Health Ministry
British pound falls below $1.30 following weaker U.K. inflation figures.
UAB Urbo bankas in Vilnius registers new Articles of Association, company code 112027077, at Konstitucijos pr.18B.
news.summary: Urbo Bank UAB, with the company code 112027077 and situated at Konstitucijos pr.18B in Vilnius, is the subject of the following news.

news.headline: Huawei highlights ICT's role in economic growth at GITEX GLOBAL 2024 with "The Digital Dividend" article.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on October 16, 2024, Huawei revealed an important piece of content titled "The Digital Dividend - ICT Maturity Fuels Economic Growth" at GITEX GLOBAL 2024. This article highlights the crucial role ICT maturity plays in boosting economic growth by showcasing the interconnectedness between our physical and digital realms.

news.headline: Huawei debuts industrial transformation solutions at GITEX GLOBAL 2024, themed Accelerate Digitalization.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 16, 2024, a major technology company served as a Diamond Sponsor for the GITEX GLOBAL 2024 event. Huawei showcased its support for industrial digitalization and intelligence with the theme "Accelerate Industrial Digitalization and Intelligence." The company organized the Industrial Digital and Intelligent Transformation Summit and introduced collaborative solutions as part of its participation.

news.headline: KPMG Australia is the first globally certified with BSI's AI management system, ensuring safe and responsible AI use.
news.summary: In London on October 16, 2024, KPMG Australia made history by becoming the world's first organization to receive certification from BSI for a globally recognized standard focused on ensuring safe AI management. This certification is designed to promote trust and facilitate the secure and responsible deployment of AI technologies.

news.headline: Iran's Atomic Organisation Chief: There is no change to the nuclear doctrine.
GITEX Editions debuts in Dubai with deeptech discussions around AI with founders and CEOs. October 16, 2024.
news.summary: Industry pioneers, executives, and top professionals in deeptech convened at the Dubai World Trade Centre for an exclusive event showcasing cutting-edge technologies. The event, which took place on October 16, 2024 in Dubai, UAE, brought together CEOs and leaders for insightful discussions focused on AI. The GITEX Editions introduced a premier platform for thought-provoking dialogues, setting the stage for future collaborations. This event marked the beginning of GITEX, promising an exciting lineup of events and discussions in the field of AI.

news.headline: Akastor ASA will present Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024, at 15:00 CET. CEO Karl Erik Kjelstad to present.
news.summary: Norwegian company Akastor ASA has announced a webcast presentation of its third quarter 2024 financial results scheduled for Wednesday, October 30, 2024, at 15:00 CET. The event will feature CEO Karl Erik Kjelstad as the main presenter and is open to investors and analysts.

news.headline: 136th Canton Fair opens in Guangzhou on Oct 15 with 3,000+ participating, spanning Oct 15-Nov 4. #LeadingMarket
news.summary: On October 15, 2024, the Canton Fair, also known as the China Import and Export Fair, commenced its 136th session in Guangzhou. Running until November 4, the event is divided into three phases and boasts more than 3,000 participating exhibitors.

news.headline: AMSilk partners with Ajinomoto for industrial fermentation of spider silk-based proteins.
news.summary: Neuried, Germany - On October 16, 2024, AMSilk GmbH, a leading company in innovative biomaterials derived from spider silk proteins, revealed a new partnership with Ajinomoto Foods Europe. Ajinomoto, boasting more than 50 years of industrial expertise, joins forces with AMSilk to enhance their collaborative efforts. This collaboration aims to leverage AMSilk's cutting-edge technology and Ajinomoto's extensive experience to develop groundbreaking products. This alliance represents a strategic move for both companies to tap into new opportunities in the biomaterials market.

news.headline: Biocomposites invests in InfectoTest's InfectoSynovia, a point-of-care test for PJI, offering diagnosis in under five minutes using electrochemical analysis.
news.summary: InfectoSynovia is in the process of creation to offer a rapid bedside test with a high level of accuracy, capable of diagnosing Periprosthetic Joint Infection (PJI) in under five minutes. This innovative technology relies on InfectoTest's unique approach to identifying infections in minuscule amounts of synovial fluid through an electrochemical analysis technique. The development of InfectoSynovia has attracted significant investment to further propel its advancement in the medical field.

news.headline: Tata Elxsi launches Coalesce, an XR platform powered by Snapdragon Spaces for digital twins & 3D collaboration.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, Tata Elxsi, a prominent global design and technology services firm, unveiled the introduction of Coalesce utilizing the Snapdragon Spaces™ XR Platform in collaboration with Qualcomm. The partnership aims to leverage the advanced capabilities of the platform to enhance XR experiences.

news.headline: Australian Firefighters Calendar 2025 launches in Europe, marking its 32nd year with fans in 90+countries.
news.summary: In Gold Coast, Australia, on October 16, 2024, the 32nd edition of the renowned Australian Firefighters Calendar for 2025 has been released. This calendar, which has a widespread global appeal, is beloved by fans in more than 90 countries. Each annual release of the calendar continues to captivate audiences worldwide.

news.headline: Sony acquires KinaTrax, Inc., new in player performance; expands into biomechanics. Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Sony Corporation has announced its expansion into the biomechanics and player performance sector with the acquisition of KinaTrax, Inc. This move, made on October 16, 2024, marks Sony's strategic entrance into this field. KinaTrax, known for its expertise in markerless motion technology, will be a key addition to Sony's portfolio. This development signifies Sony's commitment to advancing technology and performance analysis in sports, highlighting its dedication to innovation.

news.headline: Telix presented 13 abstracts at EANM Congress, showcasing their theranostic development and MedTech.
news.summary: Today, in Melbourne, Australia on October 16, 2024, Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (ASX: TLX) has revealed the inclusion of thirteen abstract presentations highlighting the company's advancements in theranostic development, medical technologies (MedTech), as well as research and innovation (R&I).
